---
title: "Less is more"
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: [title, date]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

You can review the following documents for additional information:

::: {#sample-listings}
:::

Click to my Chinese blog [here](https://guozheng.rbind.io).
